prompt: Using the uploaded image and without changing the face, create a vibrant high-fashion editorial portrait of a beautiful young woman standing confidently against a bold geometric wall made of saturated yellow, cyan, pink, and orange color blocks. She is wearing a stylish fitted white graphic T-shirt with colorful typography, one arm raised above her head in a relaxed fashion pose, showing effortless confidence and modern fashion attitude. Maintain her original facial features, soft natural hair texture, direct intense eye contact, and authentic expression. Warm golden-hour sunlight casts crisp dramatic shadows across her face and the colorful background. Ultra-realistic skin texture, razor-sharp focus, clean minimalist composition, vivid colors, commercial fashion campaign aesthetic, editorial photography style, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, cinematic lighting, premium magazine quality, hyper-detailed, 8K photorealistic.
promptEn: Using the uploaded image and without changing the face, create a vibrant high-fashion editorial portrait of a beautiful young woman standing confidently against a bold geometric wall made of saturated yellow, cyan, pink, and orange color blocks. She is wearing a stylish fitted white graphic T-shirt with colorful typography, one arm raised above her head in a relaxed fashion pose, showing effortless confidence and modern fashion attitude. Maintain her original facial features, soft natural hair texture, direct intense eye contact, and authentic expression. Warm golden-hour sunlight casts crisp dramatic shadows across her face and the colorful background. Ultra-realistic skin texture, razor-sharp focus, clean minimalist composition, vivid colors, commercial fashion campaign aesthetic, editorial photography style, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, cinematic lighting, premium magazine quality, hyper-detailed, 8K photorealistic.
promptZh: 使用上传的图像，在不改变面部特征的前提下，创作一张 充满活力的高级时尚人像，画面中一位美丽的年轻女性自信地站在 由饱和的黄色、青色、粉色和橙色色块组成的几何墙面 前。她身穿 一件带有彩色排版的时尚修身白色印花 T 恤，一只手臂举过头顶，摆出轻松的时尚姿势，展现出毫不费力的自信与现代时尚态度。保持她原本的面部特征、柔和自然的头发质感、直视镜头的强烈眼神以及真实的表情。温暖的黄金时刻阳光在她的脸上和彩色背景上投下清晰而富有戏剧性的阴影。超写实的皮肤质感、锐利的焦点、简洁极简的构图、鲜艳的色彩、商业时尚大片审美、杂志摄影风格、85mm 镜头、浅景深、电影级布光、顶级杂志画质、超高细节、8K 照片级真实感。
